title: The Final Handover Checklist: Every Micro-Step to Complete Before Leaving Your Empty Property
excerpt: Final handover checklist empty property: micro-steps before leaving keys, move-out tenant landlord deposit Addis Ababa complete guide.
content:
The final handover checklist: every micro-step to complete before leaving your empty property

Empty property handover is micro-step marathon—one forgotten closet key or running toilet erodes deposit and landlord trust. Final checklist walks room by room utility by utility until keys transfer witness signed and echo sole sound left.

This guide completes every micro-step before leaving empty property at handover.

Utilities and systems

  • Final electric water meter photo timestamp.
  • Accounts closed or transferred receipt saved.
  • Breaker labeled off except required.
  • Gas closed if applicable.
  • Water main off no drip toilets.
  • Router removed patch holes if lease requires.

Room sweep micro-steps

Closets drawers cabinets open check; behind doors; under sinks; attic storage; balcony planters; curtain rods if removing patch; smoke detector battery if depleted replace.

Keys and access

All keys remotes cards fobs list signed; mailbox; parking pass; gate clicker; duplicate you retained zero unauthorized.

Cleaning final pass

Trash removed not corridor; sweep mop; windows smear free; appliances empty clean; professional receipt attach handover email.

Documentation

Video walkthrough empty unit; handover form both sign; email landlord copy same hour; dispute note form if disagreements itemized.

Active Movers last walk

Crew confirms no boxes left truck; client closet check mirror tenant; sticker removal company branding accidental walls.

Conclusion

Final handover completes meters keys closets clean documentation—empty property micro-steps done once deposit safe and chapter closed clean.
author: Active Movers Team
